name: Divine Influence
official_rules_text: Other  alliedunit Trooper units gain Guardian 2: C-3PO while they are within 1 and in LOS of an allied C-3PO. While allied unit Trooper units within 1 and in LOS of an allied C-3PO use Guardian X, they may cancel b results as if they were a results.
